com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension.ExtensiblePrimitiveVerifier

Package
Description
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Classes used to verify preconditions, postconditions and invariants of core Java types.

  • Uses of ExtensiblePrimitiveVerifier in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java

    Subinterfaces of ExtensiblePrimitiveVerifier in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    BigDecimalPrecisionVerifier
    Verifies the requirements of a BigDecimal.precision().
    interface 
    PrimitiveCharacterVerifier
    Verifies the requirements of a Comparable value.
    interface 
    PrimitiveFloatingPointVerifier<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    Verifies the requirements of a primitive floating-point number.
    interface 
    PrimitiveIntegerVerifier<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    Verifies the requirements of a primitive integer number.
    interface 
    PrimitiveNumberVerifier<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    Verifies the requirements of a primitive number (e.g.
    interface 
    SizeVerifier
    Verifies the requirements of the size of a collection.

  • Uses of ExtensiblePrimitiveVerifier in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal

    Classes in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal that implement ExtensiblePrimitiveVerifier
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final class 
    BigDecimalPrecisionVerifierImpl
    Default implementation of BigDecimalPrecisionVerifier.
    final class 
    BigDecimalPrecisionVerifierNoOp
    A BigDecimalPrecisionVerifier that does nothing.
    final class 
    BigDecimalScaleVerifierImpl
    An implementation of PrimitiveNumberVerifier for a BigDecimal's scale.
    final class 
    PrimitiveCharacterVerifierImpl
    Default implementation of PrimitiveCharacterVerifier.
    final class 
    PrimitiveCharacterVerifierNoOp
    A PrimitiveCharacterVerifier that does nothing.
    final class 
    PrimitiveDoubleVerifierImpl
    Default implementation of PrimitiveFloatingPointVerifier for doubles.
    final class 
    PrimitiveFloatingPointVerifierNoOp<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    A PrimitiveFloatingPointVerifier that does nothing.
    final class 
    PrimitiveFloatVerifierImpl
    Default implementation of PrimitiveFloatingPointVerifier for floats.
    final class 
    PrimitiveIntegerVerifierImpl<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    Default implementation of PrimitiveIntegerVerifier.
    final class 
    PrimitiveIntegerVerifierNoOp<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    A PrimitiveIntegerVerifier that does nothing.
    final class 
    PrimitiveNumberVerifierImpl<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    Default implementation of PrimitiveNumberVerifier.
    final class 
    PrimitiveNumberVerifierNoOp<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    A PrimitiveNumberVerifier that does nothing.
    final class 
    SizeVerifierImpl
    Default implementation of a SizeVerifier.
    final class 
    SizeVerifierNoOp
    A SizeVerifier that does nothing.
